scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: integrate(), remove_relation(), waiting for active status, AppStatusRelation fields, cli() fallback for raw data. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.ssh() method — not mentioned in gold standard and may not exist in jubilant API. Also juju.status() as a standalone call (vs juju.wait()) is uncertain but plausible. Minor risk items.
